config.name: PWR_VOSR
config.description: Selects the core voltage scaling range.

config.name: MSIPLL1N_VALUE
config.description: Selects the MSIRC1 PLL correction factor.

config.name: MSIS_SRCDIV
config.values: RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC0_DIV1 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC0_DIV2 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC0_DIV4 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC0_DIV8 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC1_DIV1 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC1_DIV2 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC1_DIV4 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIS_IRC1_DIV8
config.description: Selects the source and divide factor for MSIS.

config.name: MSIK_SRCDIV
config.values: RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC0_DIV1 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC0_DIV2 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC0_DIV4 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC0_DIV8 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC1_DIV1 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC1_DIV2 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC1_DIV4 RCC_ICSCR1_MSIK_IRC1_DIV8
config.description: Selects the source and divide factor for MSIK.

config.name: STOPWUCK
config.description: Selects the system clock source after STOP mode.

config.name: STOPKERWUCK
config.description: Selects the kernel clock source after STOP mode.

config.name: DAC1SH_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the DAC1 sample-and-hold clock.

config.name: LPTIM1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM1 clock.

config.name: LPTIM2_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM2 clock.

config.name: LPTIM34_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM3 and LPTIM4 clocks.

config.name: OCTOSPI_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the OCTOSPI clock.

config.name: I3C1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the I3C1 clock.

config.name: I3C2_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the I3C2 clock.

config.name: SAI1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the SAI1 clock.

config.name: ADF1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the ADF1 clock.

consumer.name: USART1_SERIAL_DRIVER
consumer.description: Serial driver demands the USART1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: USART1_SIO_DRIVER
consumer.description: SIO driver demands the USART1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: USART3_SERIAL_DRIVER
consumer.description: Serial driver demands the USART3 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: USART3_SIO_DRIVER
consumer.description: SIO driver demands the USART3 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: UART4_SERIAL_DRIVER
consumer.description: Serial driver demands the UART4 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: UART4_SIO_DRIVER
consumer.description: SIO driver demands the UART4 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: UART5_SERIAL_DRIVER
consumer.description: Serial driver demands the UART5 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: UART5_SIO_DRIVER
consumer.description: SIO driver demands the UART5 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: LPUART1_SERIAL_DRIVER
consumer.description: Serial driver demands the LPUART1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: LPUART1_SIO_DRIVER
consumer.description: SIO driver demands the LPUART1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: LPTIM1_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the LPTIM1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: LPTIM2_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the LPTIM2 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: LPTIM34_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the LPTIM3 and LPTIM4 clocks when enabled.

consumer.name: SPI1_DRIVER
consumer.description: SPI driver demands the SPI1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: SPI2_DRIVER
consumer.description: SPI driver demands the SPI2 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: SPI3_DRIVER
consumer.description: SPI driver demands the SPI3 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: OCTOSPI_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the OCTOSPI clock when enabled.

consumer.name: USB1_DRIVER
consumer.description: USB driver demands the USB clock when enabled.

consumer.name: SDMMC1_DRIVER
consumer.description: SDC driver demands the SDMMC1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: I2C1_DRIVER
consumer.description: I2C driver demands the I2C1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: I2C2_DRIVER
consumer.description: I2C driver demands the I2C2 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: I2C3_DRIVER
consumer.description: I2C driver demands the I2C3 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: I3C1_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the I3C1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: I3C2_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the I3C2 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: ADCDAC_ADC_DRIVER
consumer.description: ADC driver demands the ADCDAC clock when enabled.

consumer.name: ADCDAC_DAC_DRIVER
consumer.description: DAC driver demands the ADCDAC clock when enabled.

consumer.name: DAC1SH_REQUIRED
consumer.description: DAC sample-and-hold logic demands the DAC1SH clock when enabled.

consumer.name: RNG_DRIVER
consumer.description: TRNG driver demands the RNG clock when enabled.

consumer.name: FDCAN1_DRIVER
consumer.description: CAN driver demands the FDCAN1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: SAI1_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the SAI1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: ADF1_REQUIRED
consumer.description: Local option demands the ADF1 clock when enabled.

consumer.name: MSIS_IRC0_SOURCE
consumer.description: MSIS demands MSIRC0 when selected as its source.

consumer.name: MSIS_IRC1_SOURCE
consumer.description: MSIS demands MSIRC1 when selected as its source.

consumer.name: MSIK_IRC0_SOURCE
consumer.description: MSIK demands MSIRC0 when selected as its source.

consumer.name: MSIK_IRC1_SOURCE
consumer.description: MSIK demands MSIRC1 when selected as its source.
